text.title: Linear Issue Tracking (Project Manager) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Linear Issue Tracking (Project Manager) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: schedule-ceremonies
step.action: Block planning + mid-cycle + retro slots per cycle.

step.name: quarterly-velocity
step.action: Compute completion ratio; if <0.65, recompute capacity (link to capacity-fit-calculator).
